meaning: n.翻译,表现,描写,透视图,粉刷,表演,打底,复制图
examples: This phrase may well have been a rendering of a popular Arabic expression.
This is a form of rendering professional help.
Silent genes accumulate random mutations, they reasoned, eventually rendering them useless.
Any bank unable to raise private capital, perhaps rendering it insolvent, would be taken over.
The mortgage-backed securities experienced dramatic, unprecedented declines in value, effectively rendering five corporates insolvent.
